1‚Üí// Package claude provides response translation functionality for Codex to Claude Code API compatibility.
     2‚Üí// This package handles the conversion of Codex API responses into Claude Code-compatible
     3‚Üí// Server-Sent Events (SSE) format, implementing a sophisticated state machine that manages
     4‚Üí// different response types including text content, thinking processes, and function calls.
     5‚Üí// The translation ensures proper sequencing of SSE events and maintains state across
     6‚Üí// multiple response chunks to provide a seamless streaming experience.
     7‚Üípackage claude
     8‚Üí
     9‚Üíimport (
    10‚Üí	"bytes"
    11‚Üí	"context"
    12‚Üí	"strings"
    13‚Üí
    14‚Üí	translatorcommon "github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/translator/common"
    15‚Üí	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/translator/gptinclaude"
    16‚Üí	"github.com/router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI/v6/internal/util"
    17‚Üí	"github.com/tidwall/gjson"
    18‚Üí	"github.com/tidwall/sjson"
    19‚Üí)
    20‚Üí
    21‚Üívar (
    22‚Üí	dataTag = []byte("data:")
    23‚Üí)
    24‚Üí
    25‚Üí// ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams holds parameters for response conversion.
    26‚Üítype ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams struct {
    27‚Üí	HasToolCall                        bool
    28‚Üí	BlockIndex                         int
    29‚Üí	HasReceivedArgumentsDelta          bool
    30‚Üí	SkipNextSyntheticWebSearchStart    bool
    31‚Üí	LastBuiltinWebSearchQuery          string
    32‚Üí	LastToolProgressCategory           string
    33‚Üí	EmittedSyntheticWebSearchStarts    map[string]struct{}
    34‚Üí	EmittedSyntheticWebSearchCompletes map[string]struct{}
    35‚Üí}
    36‚Üí
    37‚Üí// ConvertCodexResponseToClaude performs sophisticated streaming response format conversion.
    38‚Üí// This function implements a complex state machine that translates Codex API responses
    39‚Üí// into Claude Code-compatible Server-Sent Events (SSE) format. It manages different response types
    40‚Üí// and handles state transitions between content blocks, thinking processes, and function calls.
    41‚Üí//
    42‚Üí// Response type states: 0=none, 1=content, 2=thinking, 3=function
    43‚Üí// The function maintains state across multiple calls to ensure proper SSE event sequencing.
    44‚Üí//
    45‚Üí// Parameters:
    46‚Üí//   - ctx: The context for the request, used for cancellation and timeout handling
    47‚Üí//   - modelName: The name of the model being used for the response (unused in current implementation)
    48‚Üí//   - rawJSON: The raw JSON response from the Codex API
    49‚Üí//   - param: A pointer to a parameter object for maintaining state between calls
    50‚Üí//
    51‚Üí// Returns:
    52‚Üí//   - [][]byte: A slice of Claude Code-compatible JSON responses
    53‚Üífunc ConvertCodexResponseToClaude(ctx context.Context, _ string, originalRequestRawJSON, requestRawJSON, rawJSON []byte, param *any) [][]byte {
    54‚Üí	if *param == nil {
    55‚Üí		initialQuery := gptinclaude.InferBuiltinWebSearchQuery(originalRequestRawJSON)
    56‚Üí		*param = &ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams{
    57‚Üí			HasToolCall:                        false,
    58‚Üí			BlockIndex:                         0,
    59‚Üí			LastBuiltinWebSearchQuery:          initialQuery,
    60‚Üí			EmittedSyntheticWebSearchStarts:    map[string]struct{}{},
    61‚Üí			EmittedSyntheticWebSearchCompletes: map[string]struct{}{},
    62‚Üí		}
    63‚Üí	}
    64‚Üí
    65‚Üí	// log.Debugf("rawJSON: %s", string(rawJSON))
    66‚Üí	if !bytes.HasPrefix(rawJSON, dataTag) {
    67‚Üí		return [][]byte{}
    68‚Üí	}
    69‚Üí	rawJSON = bytes.TrimSpace(rawJSON[5:])
    70‚Üí
    71‚Üí	output := make([]byte, 0, 512)
    72‚Üí	rootResult := gjson.ParseBytes(rawJSON)
    73‚Üí	typeResult := rootResult.Get("type")
    74‚Üí	typeStr := typeResult.String()
    75‚Üí	clientKind := gptinclaude.DetectClientKind(ctx)
    76‚Üí	var template []byte
    77‚Üí	if typeStr == "response.created" {
    78‚Üí		template = []byte(`{"type":"message_start","message":{"id":"","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"claude-opus-4-1-20250805","stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0},"content":[],"stop_reason":null}}`)
    79‚Üí		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "message.model", rootResult.Get("response.model").String())
    80‚Üí		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "message.id", rootResult.Get("response.id").String())
    81‚Üí
    82‚Üí		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "message_start", template, 2)
    83‚Üí		if gptinclaude.ShouldEmitSyntheticWebSearchTag(clientKind) && gptinclaude.ShouldPreEmitBuiltinWebSearchProgress(originalRequestRawJSON) {
    84‚Üí			syntheticText := gptinclaude.BuildSyntheticWebSearchToolCallTextFromRequest(originalRequestRawJSON)
    85‚Üí			if syntheticText != "" {
    86‚Üí				blockIndex := (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex
    87‚Üí
    88‚Üí				template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_start","index":0,"content_block":{"type":"text","text":""}}`)
    89‚Üí				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", blockIndex)
    90‚Üí				output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_start", template, 2)
    91‚Üí
    92‚Üí				template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"text_delta","text":""}}`)
    93‚Üí				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", blockIndex)
    94‚Üí				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "delta.text", syntheticText)
    95‚Üí				output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_delta", template, 2)
    96‚Üí
    97‚Üí				template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_stop","index":0}`)
    98‚Üí				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", blockIndex)
    99‚Üí				output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_stop", template, 2)
   100‚Üí
   101‚Üí				(*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex++
   102‚Üí				(*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).SkipNextSyntheticWebSearchStart = true
   103‚Üí			}
   104‚Üí		} else if gptinclaude.ShouldEmitVSCodeWebSearchProgress(clientKind) && gptinclaude.ShouldPreEmitBuiltinWebSearchProgress(originalRequestRawJSON) {
   105‚Üí			progressThinking := gptinclaude.BuildVSCodeWebSearchProgressThinking(
   106‚Üí				gjson.Result{},
   107‚Üí				(*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).LastBuiltinWebSearchQuery,
   108‚Üí			)
   109‚Üí			if progressThinking != "" {
   110‚Üí				blockIndex := (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex
   111‚Üí
   112‚Üí				template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_start","index":0,"content_block":{"type":"thinking","thinking":""}}`)
   113‚Üí				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", blockIndex)
   114‚Üí				output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_start", template, 2)
   115‚Üí
   116‚Üí				template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"thinking_delta","thinking":""}}`)
   117‚Üí				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", blockIndex)
   118‚Üí				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "delta.thinking", progressThinking)
   119‚Üí				output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_delta", template, 2)
   120‚Üí
   121‚Üí				template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_stop","index":0}`)
   122‚Üí				template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", blockIndex)
   123‚Üí				output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_stop", template, 2)
   124‚Üí
   125‚Üí				(*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex++
   126‚Üí			}
   127‚Üí		}
   128‚Üí	} else if typeStr == "response.reasoning_summary_part.added" {
   129‚Üí		if !gptinclaude.ShouldSurfaceReasoningSummaryAsThinking(clientKind) {
   130‚Üí			return [][]byte{output}
   131‚Üí		}
   132‚Üí		template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_start","index":0,"content_block":{"type":"thinking","thinking":""}}`)
   133‚Üí		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex)
   134‚Üí
   135‚Üí		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_start", template, 2)
   136‚Üí	} else if typeStr == "response.reasoning_summary_text.delta" {
   137‚Üí		if !gptinclaude.ShouldSurfaceReasoningSummaryAsThinking(clientKind) {
   138‚Üí			return [][]byte{output}
   139‚Üí		}
   140‚Üí		template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"thinking_delta","thinking":""}}`)
   141‚Üí		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex)
   142‚Üí		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "delta.thinking", rootResult.Get("delta").String())
   143‚Üí
   144‚Üí		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_delta", template, 2)
   145‚Üí	} else if typeStr == "response.reasoning_summary_part.done" {
   146‚Üí		if !gptinclaude.ShouldSurfaceReasoningSummaryAsThinking(clientKind) {
   147‚Üí			return [][]byte{output}
   148‚Üí		}
   149‚Üí		template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_stop","index":0}`)
   150‚Üí		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex)
   151‚Üí		(*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex++
   152‚Üí
   153‚Üí		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_stop", template, 2)
   154‚Üí
   155‚Üí	} else if typeStr == "response.content_part.added" {
   156‚Üí		template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_start","index":0,"content_block":{"type":"text","text":""}}`)
   157‚Üí		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex)
   158‚Üí
   159‚Üí		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_start", template, 2)
   160‚Üí	} else if typeStr == "response.output_text.delta" {
   161‚Üí		template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"text_delta","text":""}}`)
   162‚Üí		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex)
   163‚Üí		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "delta.text", rootResult.Get("delta").String())
   164‚Üí
   165‚Üí		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_delta", template, 2)
   166‚Üí	} else if typeStr == "response.content_part.done" {
   167‚Üí		template = []byte(`{"type":"content_block_stop","index":0}`)
   168‚Üí		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "index", (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex)
   169‚Üí		(*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).BlockIndex++
   170‚Üí
   171‚Üí		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "content_block_stop", template, 2)
   172‚Üí	} else if typeStr == "response.completed" {
   173‚Üí		template = []byte(`{"type":"message_delta","delta":{"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null},"usage":{"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0}}`)
   174‚Üí		p := (*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).HasToolCall
   175‚Üí		stopReason := rootResult.Get("response.stop_reason").String()
   176‚Üí		if p {
   177‚Üí			template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "delta.stop_reason", "tool_use")
   178‚Üí		} else if stopReason == "max_tokens" || stopReason == "stop" {
   179‚Üí			template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "delta.stop_reason", stopReason)
   180‚Üí		} else {
   181‚Üí			template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "delta.stop_reason", "end_turn")
   182‚Üí		}
   183‚Üí		inputTokens, outputTokens, cachedTokens := extractResponsesUsage(rootResult.Get("response.usage"))
   184‚Üí		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "usage.input_tokens", inputTokens)
   185‚Üí		template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "usage.output_tokens", outputTokens)
   186‚Üí		if cachedTokens > 0 {
   187‚Üí			template, _ = sjson.SetBytes(template, "usage.cache_read_input_tokens", cachedTokens)
   188‚Üí		}
   189‚Üí
   190‚Üí		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "message_delta", template, 2)
   191‚Üí		output = translatorcommon.AppendSSEEventBytes(output, "message_stop", []byte(`{"type":"message_stop"}`), 2)
   192‚Üí	} else if typeStr == "response.output_item.added" {
   193‚Üí		itemResult := rootResult.Get("item")
   194‚Üí		itemType := itemResult.Get("type").String()
   195‚Üí		if itemType == "function_call" {
   196‚Üí			(*param).(*ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeParams).HasToolCall = true

   361‚Üí// ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeNonStream converts a non-streaming Codex response to a non-streaming Claude Code response.
   362‚Üí// This function processes the complete Codex response and transforms it into a single Claude Code-compatible
   363‚Üí// JSON response. It handles message content, tool calls, reasoning content, and usage metadata, combining all
   364‚Üí// the information into a single response that matches the Claude Code API format.
   365‚Üí//
   366‚Üí// Parameters:
   367‚Üí//   - ctx: The context for the request, used for cancellation and timeout handling
   368‚Üí//   - modelName: The name of the model being used for the response (unused in current implementation)
   369‚Üí//   - rawJSON: The raw JSON response from the Codex API
   370‚Üí//   - param: A pointer to a parameter object for the conversion (unused in current implementation)
   371‚Üí//
   372‚Üí// Returns:
   373‚Üí//   - []byte: A Claude Code-compatible JSON response containing all message content and metadata
   374‚Üífunc ConvertCodexResponseToClaudeNonStream(ctx context.Context, _ string, originalRequestRawJSON, _ []byte, rawJSON []byte, _ *any) []byte {
   375‚Üí	revNames := buildReverseMapFromClaudeOriginalShortToOriginal(originalRequestRawJSON)
   376‚Üí	clientKind := gptinclaude.DetectClientKind(ctx)
   377‚Üí
   378‚Üí	rootResult := gjson.ParseBytes(rawJSON)
   379‚Üí	if rootResult.Get("type").String() != "response.completed" {
   380‚Üí		return []byte{}
   381‚Üí	}
   382‚Üí
   383‚Üí	responseData := rootResult.Get("response")
   384‚Üí	if !responseData.Exists() {
   385‚Üí		return []byte{}
   386‚Üí	}
   387‚Üí
   388‚Üí	out := []byte(`{"id":"","type":"message","role":"assistant","model":"","content":[],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0}}`)
   389‚Üí	out, _ = sjson.SetBytes(out, "id", responseData.Get("id").String())
   390‚Üí	out, _ = sjson.SetBytes(out, "model", responseData.Get("model").String())
   391‚Üí	inputTokens, outputTokens, cachedTokens := extractResponsesUsage(responseData.Get("usage"))
   392‚Üí	out, _ = sjson.SetBytes(out, "usage.input_tokens", inputTokens)
   393‚Üí	out, _ = sjson.SetBytes(out, "usage.output_tokens", outputTokens)
   394‚Üí	if cachedTokens > 0 {
   395‚Üí		out, _ = sjson.SetBytes(out, "usage.cache_read_input_tokens", cachedTokens)
   396‚Üí	}
   397‚Üí
   398‚Üí	hasToolCall := false
   399‚Üí
   400‚Üí	if output := responseData.Get("output"); output.Exists() && output.IsArray() {
   401‚Üí		output.ForEach(func(_, item gjson.Result) bool {
   402‚Üí			switch item.Get("type").String() {
   403‚Üí			case "reasoning":
   404‚Üí				if !gptinclaude.ShouldSurfaceReasoningSummaryAsThinking(clientKind) {
   405‚Üí					return true
   406‚Üí				}
   407‚Üí				thinkingBuilder := strings.Builder{}
   408‚Üí				if summary := item.Get("summary"); summary.Exists() {
   409‚Üí					if summary.IsArray() {
   410‚Üí						summary.ForEach(func(_, part gjson.Result) bool {
   411‚Üí							if txt := part.Get("text"); txt.Exists() {
   412‚Üí								thinkingBuilder.WriteString(txt.String())
   413‚Üí							} else {
   414‚Üí								thinkingBuilder.WriteString(part.String())
   415‚Üí							}
   416‚Üí							return true
   417‚Üí						})
   418‚Üí					} else {
   419‚Üí						thinkingBuilder.WriteString(summary.String())
   420‚Üí					}
   421‚Üí				}
   422‚Üí				if thinkingBuilder.Len() == 0 {
   423‚Üí					if content := item.Get("content"); content.Exists() {
   424‚Üí						if content.IsArray() {
   425‚Üí							content.ForEach(func(_, part gjson.Result) bool {
   426‚Üí								if txt := part.Get("text"); txt.Exists() {
   427‚Üí									thinkingBuilder.WriteString(txt.String())
   428‚Üí								} else {
   429‚Üí									thinkingBuilder.WriteString(part.String())
   430‚Üí								}
   431‚Üí								return true
   432‚Üí							})
   433‚Üí						} else {
   434‚Üí							thinkingBuilder.WriteString(content.String())
   435‚Üí						}
   436‚Üí					}
   437‚Üí				}
   438‚Üí				if thinkingBuilder.Len() > 0 {
   439‚Üí					block := []byte(`{"type":"thinking","thinking":""}`)
   440‚Üí					block, _ = sjson.SetBytes(block, "thinking", thinkingBuilder.String())
   441‚Üí					out, _ = sjson.SetRawBytes(out, "content.-1", block)
   442‚Üí				}
   443‚Üí			case "message":
   444‚Üí				if content := item.Get("content"); content.Exists() {
   445‚Üí					if content.IsArray() {
   446‚Üí						content.ForEach(func(_, part gjson.Result) bool {
   447‚Üí							if part.Get("type").String() == "output_text" {
   448‚Üí								text := part.Get("text").String()
   449‚Üí								if text != "" {
   450‚Üí									block := []byte(`{"type":"text","text":""}`)
   451‚Üí									block, _ = sjson.SetBytes(block, "text", text)
   452‚Üí									out, _ = sjson.SetRawBytes(out, "content.-1", block)
   453‚Üí								}
   454‚Üí							}
   455‚Üí							return true
   456‚Üí						})
   457‚Üí					} else {
   458‚Üí						text := content.String()
   459‚Üí						if text != "" {
   460‚Üí							block := []byte(`{"type":"text","text":""}`)
   461‚Üí							block, _ = sjson.SetBytes(block, "text", text)
   462‚Üí							out, _ = sjson.SetRawBytes(out, "content.-1", block)
   463‚Üí						}
   464‚Üí					}
   465‚Üí				}
   466‚Üí			case "function_call":
   467‚Üí				hasToolCall = true
   468‚Üí				name := item.Get("name").String()
   469‚Üí				if original, ok := revNames[name]; ok {
   470‚Üí					name = original
   471‚Üí				}
   472‚Üí
   473‚Üí				toolBlock := []byte(`{"type":"tool_use","id":"","name":"","input":{}}`)
   474‚Üí				toolBlock, _ = sjson.SetBytes(toolBlock, "id", util.SanitizeClaudeToolID(item.Get("call_id").String()))
   475‚Üí				toolBlock, _ = sjson.SetBytes(toolBlock, "name", name)
   476‚Üí				inputRaw := "{}"
   477‚Üí				if argsStr := item.Get("arguments").String(); argsStr != "" && gjson.Valid(argsStr) {
   478‚Üí					argsJSON := gjson.Parse(argsStr)
   479‚Üí					if argsJSON.IsObject() {
   480‚Üí						inputRaw = argsJSON.Raw
   481‚Üí					}
   482‚Üí				}
   483‚Üí				toolBlock, _ = sjson.SetRawBytes(toolBlock, "input", []byte(inputRaw))
   484‚Üí				out, _ = sjson.SetRawBytes(out, "content.-1", toolBlock)
   485‚Üí			case "web_search_call":
   486‚Üí				syntheticText := ""
   487‚Üí				if gptinclaude.ShouldEmitSyntheticWebSearchTag(clientKind) {
   488‚Üí					syntheticText = gptinclaude.BuildSyntheticWebSearchToolCallText(item.Get("action"))
   489‚Üí				}
   490‚Üí				if syntheticText != "" {
   491‚Üí					block := []byte(`{"type":"text","text":""}`)
   492‚Üí					block, _ = sjson.SetBytes(block, "text", syntheticText)
   493‚Üí					out, _ = sjson.SetRawBytes(out, "content.-1", block)
   494‚Üí				}
   495‚Üí			}
   496‚Üí			return true
   497‚Üí		})
   498‚Üí	}
   499‚Üí
   500‚Üí	if stopReason := responseData.Get("stop_reason"); stopReason.Exists() && stopReason.String() != "" {
   501‚Üí		out, _ = sjson.SetBytes(out, "stop_reason", stopReason.String())
   502‚Üí	} else if hasToolCall {
   503‚Üí		out, _ = sjson.SetBytes(out, "stop_reason", "tool_use")
   504‚Üí	} else {
   505‚Üí		out, _ = sjson.SetBytes(out, "stop_reason", "end_turn")
   506‚Üí	}
   507‚Üí
   508‚Üí	if stopSequence := responseData.Get("stop_sequence"); stopSequence.Exists() && stopSequence.String() != "" {
   509‚Üí		out, _ = sjson.SetRawBytes(out, "stop_sequence", []byte(stopSequence.Raw))
   510‚Üí	}
   511‚Üí
   512‚Üí	return out
   513‚Üí}

   515‚Üífunc extractResponsesUsage(usage gjson.Result) (int64, int64, int64) {
   516‚Üí	if !usage.Exists() || usage.Type == gjson.Null {
   517‚Üí		return 0, 0, 0
   518‚Üí	}
   519‚Üí
   520‚Üí	inputTokens := usage.Get("input_tokens").Int()
   521‚Üí	outputTokens := usage.Get("output_tokens").Int()
   522‚Üí	cachedTokens := usage.Get("input_tokens_details.cached_tokens").Int()
   523‚Üí
   524‚Üí	if cachedTokens > 0 {
   525‚Üí		if inputTokens >= cachedTokens {
   526‚Üí			inputTokens -= cachedTokens
   527‚Üí		} else {
   528‚Üí			inputTokens = 0
   529‚Üí		}
   530‚Üí	}
   531‚Üí
   532‚Üí	return inputTokens, outputTokens, cachedTokens
   533‚Üí}

   535‚Üí// buildReverseMapFromClaudeOriginalShortToOriginal builds a map[short]original from original Claude request tools.
   536‚Üífunc buildReverseMapFromClaudeOriginalShortToOriginal(original []byte) map[string]string {
   537‚Üí	tools := gjson.GetBytes(original, "tools")
   538‚Üí	rev := map[string]string{}
   539‚Üí	if !tools.IsArray() {
   540‚Üí		return rev
   541‚Üí	}
   542‚Üí	var names []string
   543‚Üí	arr := tools.Array()
   544‚Üí	for i := 0; i < len(arr); i++ {
   545‚Üí		n := arr[i].Get("name").String()
   546‚Üí		if n != "" {
   547‚Üí			names = append(names, n)
   548‚Üí		}
   549‚Üí	}
   550‚Üí	if len(names) > 0 {
   551‚Üí		m := buildShortNameMap(names)
   552‚Üí		for orig, short := range m {
   553‚Üí			rev[short] = orig
   554‚Üí		}
   555‚Üí	}
   556‚Üí	return rev
   557‚Üí}
